blurb: Elemental Shaman is the burst caster with a toolkit: Wind Shear-era earth shocks, Grounding Totem to eat polymorphs, and instant Chain Lightning procs that delete resilience-light targets. It gears like every caster in TBC — PvP set plus resilience — but leans harder on spell penetration to punch through totem and aura resistance.
statPriorityRationale: Elemental burst is front-loaded into Chain Lightning + Lava Burst-less windstorms of Nature damage, so spell damage and crit define your kill windows; spell penetration matters more than usual because Nature resistance totems and paladin auras eat your school.

faq.question: What rating are these Elemental Shamans?
faq.answer: This snapshot covers 6 Elemental Shamans between 2245 and 2351 rating (average 2290) on the TBC Classic arena ladder, refreshed from public leaderboard data.

faq.question: What is the most-used Elemental Shaman PvP gear right now?
faq.answer: The highest-consensus picks are Veteran's Mail Girdle (100%), Merciless Gladiator's Barrier (100%), Totem of the Void (100%). Anything above ~70% usage at this rating range is effectively mandatory.

faq.question: How much of the Elemental Shaman BiS list is PvP gear vs raid gear?
faq.answer: 80% of the most-used slots are arena/honor items — for Elemental Shamans the resilience on PvP gear beats raid alternatives almost everywhere. The exceptions are listed as alternatives per slot.

faq.question: What weapon do Elemental Shamans use in arena?
faq.answer: Merciless Gladiator's Gavel is the main-hand of choice (50% of surveyed players).

faq.question: What gems do Elemental Shamans socket for PvP?
faq.answer: Across all sockets, the most-used gems in this snapshot are +12 Spell Damage, +4 Spell Critical Rating and +5 Spell Penetration, +12 Spell Critical & 3% Increased Critical Damage. Socket bonuses are usually ignored unless they align with these.
